name: Forest of Lost Flowers
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>迷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まよ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い<ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Monsters you control equipped with "Starlit Papillon" are unaffected by your opponent's activated effects. Once per turn, when your "Adventurer Token" destroys a monster by battle: You can draw 1 card. Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if the previous effect was activated this turn: You can add 1 Field Spell that mentions "Adventurer Token" from your Deck or GY to your hand, except "Forest of Lost Flowers".
eff: Monsters you control equipped with "Starlit Papillon" are unaffected by your opponent's activated effects. Once per turn, when your "Adventurer Token" destroys a monster by battle: You can draw 1 card. Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if the previous effect was activated this turn: You can add 1 Field Spell that mentions "Adventurer Token" from your Deck or GY to your hand, except "Forest of Lost Flowers".

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
